title: Lethal Company modpack
description: A modpack containing all the Lethal Company mods for 1.20.1
body:
The **Lethal Company modpack** is a modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge which contains all the Lethal Company mods (compatible with Forge 1.20.1)

The modpack contains the following mods :
- [Lethal Company Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/lethal-company-mobs)
- [Lethal Company boombox musics](https://modrinth.com/mod/lethal-company-boombox-musics) (outdated because new versions are on NeoForge 1.21.1)
- [The Company](https://modrinth.com/mod/thecompany)
- [Loud Horns](https://modrinth.com/mod/loud-horns)

If you want to know more about one of thoses mods, just click on their name.
